Rose will [[Gigantamax]] his Copperajah at the first opportunity.

|trainer=Bede

|desc=Rose gave this {{p|Hatenna}} to [[Bede]] shortly after meeting him, as revealed to the player in [[The Isle of Armor]] expansion. According to Bede's [[League Card]], this changed his life forever and put him on the path to become a great {{pkmn|Trainer}}.}}
